title: Ticket 04 - Topology & cabling
description: Dummy data for ticket 04 - topology & cabling (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 04 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company topology and cabling safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training-company topology and cabling in daily work and implement it cleanly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of training-company topology and cabling in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore training-company topology and cabling as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Training-company topology and cabling should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with training-company topology and cabling.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: Training-company topology and cabling only becomes relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 04 regarding training-company topology and cabling?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For training-company topology and cabling this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning idea requires clarity, not silent guessing.
